meaning: vi.爬行,蠕动,徐徐行进n.爬行,蠕动,缓慢的行进
examples: I felt something crawl up my arm.
Our baby is just starting to crawl.
I began to crawl on my hands and knees toward the door.
It took all my energy simply to lift my mosquito net and crawl into its cocoon.
Cruz admitted to handcuffing the detainees and forcing them to crawl on the ground.
